title: PortfolioEvent
description: Shared event schema for all repos in the portfolio. Every CI run, deploy, incident, experiment, agent action, security finding, release, decision, and metric snapshot is one event.

repo.description: GitHub repo in owner/name form, e.g. naimkatiman/tradeclaw.

source.description: What emitted the event: github-actions, wrangler, manual, agent:<name>, cron:<name>.

actor.description: Human or agent responsible, e.g. naimkatiman or agent:portfolio-health.

severity.description: Required in practice for incident and security events.

evidenceUrl.description: Link to the receipt: CI run, release receipt file, experiment file, dashboard.

metricName.description: For metric events: stable snake_case metric name.

metadata.description: Event-type-specific payload. Keep flat and JSON-serializable.
